summary: Tested mobile scrolling fixes and video display changes on Blendlink landing page. All CSS scroll fixes verified working - no horizontal scroll, smooth vertical scrolling, touch-action: manipulation applied. Video element has correct object-fit: contain and native controls. Video file exists and is accessible (HTTP 200) but doesn't load in Playwright headless browser (likely browser limitation, not code issue).

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint may not exist or route not configured

action_items: VERIFY: Test video playback in real browser (Chrome/Safari on mobile device) - Playwright headless may have video loading limitations
OPTIONAL: Consider adding a fallback message or retry mechanism if video fails to load
critical_code_review_comments: CSS scroll fixes correctly implemented - removed scroll-behavior: smooth, added -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch
Video element has correct attributes: object-fit: contain, controls=true, autoplay, muted, loop, playsInline
Video file exists at /public/blendlink-promo.mp4 (4.8MB) and is served with correct MIME type (video/mp4)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All scroll fixes verified, video element configured correctly but not loading in headless browser

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile scrolling fixes verified working. Video element has correct configuration (object-fit: contain, controls=true). Video file is valid MP4 and accessible via HTTP but Playwright headless browser shows networkState=3. Recommend testing video playback in real browser.

mobile_scrolling_smooth.details: Vertical scrolling works, scroll-behavior: smooth removed, touch-action: manipulation applied

no_horizontal_scroll.details: scrollWidth=390, clientWidth=390, overflow-x: hidden on html/body

video_object_fit_contain.details: object-fit: contain applied - video will not be cropped

video_native_controls.details: controls=true attribute present, native video controls visible

video_aspect_ratio_preserved.details: object-fit: contain ensures aspect ratio is preserved

video_playback.details: Video file exists and is accessible (HTTP 200, video/mp4) but Playwright headless browser shows networkState=3. This is likely a headless browser limitation, not a code issue. Recommend testing in real browser.
